member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The exception to wrap.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.Services.PathwayException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The exception id.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.Services.PathwayException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The exception id.
The exception to wrap.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The exception id.
The error message.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The exception id.
The error message.
The exception to wrap.

member.name: P:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.Services.SynergyException.ExceptionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the exception id.

member.name: P:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.Services.SynergyException.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message.

member.name: P:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.Services.SynergyException.DevNotes
member.summary: Gets or sets the dev notes.

member.name: P:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.Services.SynergyException.WrappedException
member.summary: Gets or sets the wrapped exception.

member.name: T:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.ExceptionManagerController
member.summary: Controller for handling exceptions. Mirrors functionality of the original ServiceExceptionManager.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.ExceptionManagerController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.ExceptionManagerController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.ExceptionManagerController.ManageException(SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.DTOs.ExceptionDto)
member.summary: Manages the provided exception. This endpoint mimics the ManageException methods of the original WCF service.
member.param: A DTO containing the exception to be managed.
member.returns: An IActionResult representing the result of the operation. Returns 500 Internal Server Error with a BasicFaultContract on failure.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.ExceptionManagerController.ProcessException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Processes the exception and converts it to a FaultException if necessary.
member.param: The exception to process.

member.name: T:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController
member.summary: SynergyApplicationFramework API Controller Provides REST endpoints for SynergyApplicationFramework operations

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SynergyApplicationFrameworkController

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.LoadInstanceOntoTrolley(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Loads a specific instance onto a trolley for a given turnaround, user, and station.
member.param: The unique identifier of the instance to load.
The unique identifier of the trolley turnaround event.
The unique identifier of the user performing the action.
The unique identifier of the station where the loading is occurring.
member.returns: Returns true if the instance was successfully loaded onto the trolley; otherwise, false. Returns an error if an exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.RetrospectiveAddToWashBatch(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Attempts to retrospectively add a container instance to an existing wash batch. This is typically used when a container was processed without being properly associated with a batch initially.
member.param: The ID of the container instance to be added to the wash batch.
The ID of the container instance representing the wash batch to add to.
The ID of the wash station where the wash batch was processed.
The ID of the user performing the action.
member.returns: True if the container instance was successfully added to the wash batch; otherwise, false. Returns an error if any exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.DeliverDeliveryNote(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks a delivery note as delivered at a specific station by a specific user.
member.param: The unique identifier of the delivery note.
The unique identifier of the station where the delivery is being made.
The unique identifier of the user performing the delivery.
member.returns: True if the delivery note was successfully marked as delivered; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.AddTurnaroundToStoragePoint(System.Int32,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a turnaround to a specific storage point.
member.param: The unique identifier of the storage point.
The external identifier of the turnaround.
The unique identifier of the station associated with the turnaround.
The unique identifier of the user performing the action.
member.returns: True if the turnaround was successfully added to the storage point; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.AddTrolleyToStoragePoint(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a trolley to a specific storage point within a station, recording the user who performed the action.
member.param: The unique identifier of the storage point.
The unique identifier of the trolley to be added.
The unique identifier of the station where the storage point is located.
The unique identifier of the user performing the action.
member.returns: True if the trolley was successfully added to the storage point; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetCustomisableListValuesForTenancy(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Retrieves a list of configurable list values for a specific tenancy, optionally filtered by event type.
member.param: The ID of the list type to retrieve values for.
The ID of the tenancy to retrieve values for.
Optional. The ID of the event type to filter the list values by. If null, all list values for the tenancy are returned.
member.returns: A ConfigurableListDataContract containing the list of configurable list values. Returns NotFound if no values are found. Returns StatusCode 500 for internal server errors.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetConfiguredDefectResponsibilities(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of configured defect responsibilities for a specific facility. Each responsibility is represented as a key-value pair, where the key is a byte representing the responsibility ID and the value is a string representing the responsibility description.
member.param: The ID of the facility for which to retrieve defect responsibilities.
member.returns: A list of key-value pairs representing the configured defect responsibilities for the specified facility. Returns an empty list if no responsibilities are configured or an error occurs. Returns a 500 Internal Server Error if an unexpected exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetAllReportsForUser(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all reports associated with a specific user.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.
member.returns: A list of ReportData objects representing the reports for the user. Returns an empty list if no reports are found. Returns a 500 Internal Server Error if an exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetAllFavouriteReports(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all favourite reports for a given user.
member.param: The ID of the user whose favourite reports are to be retrieved.
member.returns: A list of FavouriteReportContract objects representing the user's favourite reports. Returns an empty list if no favourite reports are found. Returns a 500 Internal Server Error if an exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.DeleteFavouriteReport(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a favourite report based on its ID.
member.param: The ID of the favourite report to delete.
member.returns: An OperationResponseContract indicating the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.CreateFavouriteReport(SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.DTOs.FavouriteReportContract)
member.summary: Creates a new favourite report in the system.
member.param: The data for the new favourite report.
member.returns: The ID of the newly created favourite report. Returns 500 if an error occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.EditFavouriteReport(SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Application.DTOs.FavouriteReportContract)
member.param: The updated favourite report data.
member.returns: An OperationResponseContract indicating the success or failure of the operation.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetReportOutputTypes(System.Int16)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of available output types for a given report ID.
member.param: The ID of the report to retrieve output types for.
member.returns: A list of ReportOutputTypeContract objects representing the available output types. Returns an error if an exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.MarkReportAsFavourite(System.Int32,System.Int16)
member.summary: Marks a report as a favorite for a specific user.
member.param: The ID of the user.
The ID of the report to mark as favorite.
member.returns: An OperationResponseContract containing the number of favorite reports for the user, or an error if the operation fails.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetFavouriteReport(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a favourite report by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the favourite report to retrieve.
member.returns: An ActionResult containing the FavouriteReportContract if found, otherwise an error.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetListOfParametersForFavouriteReport(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of saved parameter collections for a user's favorite report.
member.param: The ID of the user.
The ID of the report.
member.returns: A list of UsersSavedReportParameterCollection objects. Returns an empty list if no parameters are found. Returns a 500 Internal Server Error if an exception occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.CheckArchiveCMAndLKR(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a Container Instance with the given ID is archived in both CM (Content Management) and LKR (Likelihood of Recovery) systems.
member.param: The ID of the Container Instance to check.
member.returns: True if the Container Instance is archived in both CM and LKR, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.CreateLinkingForCase
member.summary: Creates a linking between a case and other related entities (e.g., documents, parties). This endpoint handles the creation of these links based on provided data.
member.returns: An ActionResult indicating success or failure. Returns 200 OK on success, or an appropriate error code (e.g., 400 Bad Request, 500 Internal Server Error) on failure.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetItemExceptionDates(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of exception dates for a specific item within a container instance.
member.param: The external identifier of the item.
The identifier of the container instance.
member.returns: A list of ItemExceptionsDataContract objects representing the exception dates. Returns an empty list if no exceptions are found. Returns a 500 Internal Server Error if an error occurs.

member.name: M:SynergyApplicationFrameworkApi.Controllers.SynergyApplicationFrameworkController.GetItemExceptionDatesByTurnaroundId(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of item exception dates based on the external ID and turnaround ID.
member.param: The external identifier of the item.
The identifier of the turnaround.
member.returns: A list of ItemExceptionsDataContract objects representing the exception dates. Returns an empty list if no exceptions are found. Returns a 500 Internal Server Error if an exception occurs.
